expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Instead describes raw REST API call: 'POST https://wnesolutions.atlassian.net/wiki/rest/api/content'. States 'This task cannot be completed without authenticated access to the Confluence API.'

Body contains sections for Context, Decision, Consequences, and Status
Body uses HTML storage format (h2 tags or similar) or plain text that will be auto-wrapped
